about.title: About
about.subtitle: Johnie — Photographer & AI Developer
about.intro1: I am a photographer and AI developer based globally, capturing moments across continents and building intelligent systems that shape the future.
about.intro2: My photography journey has taken me through the alpine peaks of Switzerland, the historic streets of Istanbul, the Adriatic coasts of Croatia, the architectural grandeur of Budapest, and the neon-lit alleys of Tokyo. Each location tells a story, and through my lens, I seek to preserve the essence of these diverse cultures and landscapes.
about.intro3: When I'm not behind the camera, I work on cutting-edge AI applications, merging creativity with technology to explore new possibilities in visual storytelling and computational photography.
about.businessDesc: If you want to discuss a collaboration, a photography project, or a creative idea, send an internal message here and it will appear in the admin message center for follow-up.
about.formSuccess: Your internal message has been received and is now available in the admin message center for review.
